name: Weights & Biases Weave
pricing_notes: Free tier generous (hobbyist); W&B Teams $50/seat/mo includes Weave

auth.notes: WANDB_API_KEY env var; wandb.login() or weave.init() picks it up automatically

performance.notes: Async background logging; minimal overhead on hot path

agent_readiness.notes: Decorator-based tracing: @weave.op() on any function. Auto-instruments OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain. Evaluations via weave.Evaluation class with Dataset + scorers.

gotchas: Requires W&B account; all traces uploaded to W&B cloud (no self-host option yet)
Large trace volumes can be slow to query in W&B UI
Evaluation framework still maturing vs LangSmith
best_when: Already using W&B for ML experiment tracking
Building structured evaluations with custom scorers and datasets
Teams that want trace + eval + experiment tracking in one platform
avoid_when: Just want lightweight logging without W&B account dependency
summary: W&B Weave is an LLM tracing and evaluation framework from Weights & Biases. Decorator-based tracing (@weave.op()) auto-captures inputs/outputs/latency for any Python function. Auto-instrumentation for major LLM SDKs. Pairs naturally with W&B experiment tracking. Excellent ergonomics; best for teams already in the W&B ecosystem.
